The '''Nah'Malis system''', also called the '''Danoor system''', was located in the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]] on the edge of the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]]. The [[Star system/Legends|system]] contained at least five [[Planet/Legends|planets]], one of which, [[Danoor]], supported a colony. The [[Duhrib Belt]], a collection of large [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]], [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] between the fourth and fifth planets.
